archetype_adaptation: Adapted for a high-energy 'Founder Edge' vibe. It blends cinematic dark mode (Notion/Linear) with striking neon orange highlights to represent the 'roast' (fire/heat).

typography.font_install_instructions: Add Google Fonts links for Outfit and Manrope in public/index.html or import in index.css. Apply to Tailwind config font family.

tailwind_config_instructions.colors: Override default tailwind colors to use the custom hex codes provided above. Use them explicitly for background, foreground, primary, etc.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with intense contrast. Elements must breathe.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID for Roast Results. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8. Mix tall and wide cards.
spacing_and_layout.card_padding: Use p-8 or p-12 for premium feel inside cards.

surface_strategies.hero: Cinematic and minimal. Use the fire sparks background image with a heavy bg-[#0F1117]/80 overlay. Centralized text focus with bold Typography.
surface_strategies.cards: Linear-style Glassmorphism & Grid Borders. Use background `#161A22` with border `border-white/10`. No heavy shadows; use 1px stroke to define shapes.
surface_strategies.lead_capture_wall: Heavy Glassmorphism: `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0F1117]/80`. 1px delicate inner stroke `border-white/20`. Must obscure the results completely behind it.
surface_strategies.roast_meter: Neon glow using `#FF6B35` to `#FFB703` gradient. Should feel alive and 'hot'.

components.buttons: Primary: Solid `bg-[#FF6B35]` with hover `bg-[#FF7849]`, text `#F5F7FA`. Secondary: Glassy `bg-white/5` border `border-white/10`. MUST have explicit hover states.
components.forms: Shadcn heavily customized. Input background `#0F1117`, border `border-white/10`, focus state `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B35] focus:border-transparent`.
components.bento_cards: Custom div structures using `rounded-2xl`, `bg-[#161A22]`, `border border-white/10`, and `overflow-hidden`. Do not use default Shadcn Card if it feels too boxy.
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone weight for a premium tech feel.
components.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="roast-submit-button"`).

animations.hover: Slight lift `-translate-y-1` and `shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(255,107,53,0.15)]` on interactive cards.
animations.score_meter: Animate width from 0% to calculated percentage using framer-motion.
animations.page_load: Fade up entrance (`y: 20, opacity: 0` to `y: 0, opacity: 1`) staggered for bento grid children.

hero_background.description: Fire sparks on dark background, use for the 'Roast Arena' hero section with a heavy overlay to ensure text contrast.

abstract_texture.description: Dark blue/gray abstract texture. Use for secondary section backgrounds or behind the bento grid with low opacity (e.g., opacity-10).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Framer Motion: yarn add framer-motion
Ensure all components are built as .jsx or .js files, not .tsx files.
Use the explicit color hex codes for all custom UI elements.
Construct the Roast Results page using a CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for the bento layout.
The lead capture wall must sit on top of the roast results with a z-index and heavy backdrop blur, obscuring the data until unlocked.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY form input, button, and selectable card.
